Test Case Description: UI: Navigate to Config > Root Hint page and verify page loads with default named.cache content
Expected Result: Root Hint page should load showing the named.cache text editor with default 13 root servers

Test Case Description: UI: Verify all 13 default root servers (A through M) are displayed in the text editor
Expected Result: Text editor should contain NS entries for A.ROOT-SERVERS.NET through M.ROOT-SERVERS.NET

Test Case Description: UI: Verify each default root server has correct IPv4 (A record) address displayed
Expected Result: All 13 IPv4 addresses should match IANA root server list (e.g. A=198.41.0.4)

Test Case Description: UI: Verify each default root server has correct IPv6 (AAAA record) address displayed
Expected Result: All 13 IPv6 addresses should match IANA root server list (e.g. A=2001:503:ba3e::2:30)

Test Case Description: UI: Verify the file header shows InterNIC source and last update date
Expected Result: Header comments should show InterNIC FTP source and related version of root zone

Test Case Description: UI: Verify Configure and Delete buttons are visible on Root Hint page
Expected Result: Both Configure (blue) and Delete (red) buttons should be displayed at the bottom

Test Case Description: UI: Edit root hint content in text editor - add a custom root server entry and click Configure
Expected Result: Custom root server entry should be saved successfully and page should reflect changes

Test Case Description: UI: Edit root hint content - modify an existing root server IPv4 address and click Configure
Expected Result: Modified IP address should be saved and visible after page reload

Test Case Description: UI: Edit root hint content - modify an existing root server IPv6 address and click Configure
Expected Result: Modified IPv6 address should be saved and visible after page reload

Test Case Description: UI: Edit root hint content - modify root server name and click Configure
Expected Result: Modified server name should be saved and visible after page reload

Test Case Description: UI: Add a new NS + A + AAAA entry for custom root server and click Configure
Expected Result: New custom root server entry should be saved with both IPv4 and IPv6

Test Case Description: UI: Remove a custom root server entry from text editor and click Configure
Expected Result: Removed entry should no longer appear after page reload

Test Case Description: UI: Restore a modified default root hint back to original IANA values and click Configure
Expected Result: Default root server should be restored to original IP addresses

Test Case Description: UI: Click Delete button and confirm - verify root hints are cleared
Expected Result: Root hint configuration should be deleted/cleared from the page

Test Case Description: UI: After Delete - re-enter default root hints content and click Configure to restore
Expected Result: Default root hints should be restored successfully after re-entering content

Test Case Description: UI: Enter invalid IPv4 address format (e.g. 999.999.999.999) for a root server and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should display validation error or reject the invalid IPv4 format

Test Case Description: UI: Enter invalid IPv6 address format for a root server and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should display validation error or reject the invalid IPv6 format

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with empty/missing server name and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should display validation error for missing server name

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with empty/missing IP address and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should display validation error for missing IP address

Test Case Description: UI: Enter duplicate root server entry (same name and IP as existing) and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should display error or warning for duplicate entry

Test Case Description: UI: Enter completely empty text editor content and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should display error or prevent saving empty root hints

Test Case Description: UI: Enter malformed/random text (not valid named.cache format) and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should display error for invalid root hints file format

Test Case Description: UI: Enter special characters in server name field and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should reject special characters in DNS hostname

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with loopback address (127.0.0.1) and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should reject or warn about loopback/reserved IP address

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with zero IP address (0.0.0.0) and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should reject invalid zero IP address

Test Case Description: UI: Enter SQL injection payload in server name and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should sanitize input and reject the payload

Test Case Description: UI: Enter XSS payload (<script>alert(1)</script>) in text editor and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should sanitize input and reject the XSS payload

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with server name exceeding 255 characters and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should reject hostname exceeding maximum DNS name length

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with server name exactly 253 characters (max valid DNS name)
Expected Result: UI should accept or reject based on DNS name length limit enforcement

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with single-label server name (no dots) and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should handle minimum valid single-label hostname correctly

Test Case Description: UI: Add large number of custom root server entries (50+) and click Configure
Expected Result: UI should handle bulk entries without performance issues or timeout

Test Case Description: UI: Enter root hint with uppercase server name (e.g. CUSTOM.ROOT-SERVERS.NET)
Expected Result: UI should handle case-insensitive DNS names correctly

Test Case Description: UI: Verify root hints text editor supports scrolling for full content visibility
Expected Result: Text editor should be scrollable to view all 13 root servers and their records

Test Case Description: UI: Navigate away from Root Hint page without saving changes and return
Expected Result: Unsaved changes should either prompt a warning or be discarded

Test Case Description: UI: Verify Root Hint page is accessible under Config navigation tab
Expected Result: Root Hint tab should be visible and clickable under DNS Options | DNS Firewall | ACL | ... | Root Hint

Test Case Description: UI: Verify cluster name is displayed on Root Hint page (e.g. linux_agent1)
Expected Result: Active cluster name should be shown in the top-right header

Test Case Description: UI: Switch to a different cluster and verify root hints are cluster-specific
Expected Result: Each cluster should display its own independent root hints configuration

Test Case Description: UI: Edit and Configure root hints then verify BIND named.cache file on server is updated
Expected Result: The named.cache file on the DNS server should reflect the UI changes

Test Case Description: UI: Modify root hint IP and verify DNS recursive resolution still works via dig
Expected Result: Recursive DNS queries should use the updated root hints for resolution

Test Case Description: UI: Delete root hints and verify DNS recursive resolution behavior
Expected Result: Without root hints DNS recursive resolution should fail or use fallback

Test Case Description: UI: Configure root hints then restart BIND service and verify root hints persist
Expected Result: Root hints should remain intact after named service restart

Test Case Description: UI: Click Configure without making any changes to root hints content
Expected Result: Page should save successfully with no errors (idempotent save)
